headerDisplay: Wyze plug-in for Homebridge. This is a custom component to allow control of various Wyze devices using the unofficial API. Please note this mimics the Wyze app and therefore access may be cut off at anytime. If you feel like my work has been valuable to you I welcome your support through Paypal. All funding goes back into product purchases. [![Donate](https://img.shields.io/badge/Donate-PayPal-blue.svg?style=flat-square&maxAge=2592000)](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/AllenFarmer)
footerDisplay: For documentation please see GitHub repository

name.title: Plugin Name
name.description: This name will appear in your Homebridge log

username.title: Username (E-Mail Address)
username.description: The e-mail address used for your Wyze account

password.title: Password
password.description: The password used for your Wyze account

keyId.title: Key ID
keyId.description: API Key/ID available from the official Wyze Portal https://developer-api-console.wyze.com

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: API Key/ID available from the official Wyze Portal https://developer-api-console.wyze.com/)

refreshInterval.title: Refresh Interval
refreshInterval.description: Specify the number of milliseconds to wait between updates, default is 60000 ms (60 seconds)

hms.title: HMS Subscription
hms.description: Enable if HMS Subscription is current

debug.title: Enable Camera Streaming Debug Logging
debug.description: Enables more verbose ffmpeg logging for camera stream troubleshooting. Stream URLs and credentials are redacted before plugin logs are written.

lowBatteryPercentage.title: Low Battery Percentage
lowBatteryPercentage.description: Specify the Percentage of battery when consider low, default is 30%

items.title: Device MAC Address with accessory attached
Device MAC Address with accessory attached
Device MAC Address with accessory attached
Device MAC Address with accessory attached
Device MAC Address of camera you want to control the Notification Switch

videoProcessor.title: Video Processor
videoProcessor.description: Legacy path to ffmpeg. Prefer ffmpegPath for new configs.

ffmpegPath.title: FFmpeg Path
ffmpegPath.description: Optional path to ffmpeg. If omitted, the plugin uses ffmpeg-for-homebridge when available, then falls back to ffmpeg from PATH.

cameraStreams.title: Wyze Camera Streams
cameraStreams.description: Optional RTSP, HTTP, or Wyze Bridge stream inputs to expose selected cameras as HomeKit video cameras.

source.title: Stream URL
source.description: RTSP or HTTP video source, for example rtsp://user:password@camera/live or a wyze-bridge stream URL.

stillImageSource.title: Snapshot URL
stillImageSource.description: Optional image or video source for HomeKit snapshots. Defaults to the stream URL.

audio.title: Enable Audio
audio.description: Disable this if your ffmpeg build does not include audio codecs required by HomeKit.

rtspTransport.title: RTSP Transport
rtspTransport.description: Transport to use for RTSP sources. TCP is usually more reliable for HomeKit streaming.

debug.title: Enable Debug Logging
debug.description: Enables more verbose ffmpeg logging for this camera stream.

videoProcessor.title: Video Processor
videoProcessor.description: Legacy optional per-camera ffmpeg path. Prefer ffmpegPath for new configs.
